name: Firehouse Special
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef and onion in oil, stirring to crumble the meat.
2. Combine soup and milk in a saucepan and cook, stirring, over medium heat until smooth.
3. Add chiles.
4. Cut tortillas into 1-inch squares and arrange half of them in a baking dish.
5. Spread half of the cooked meat on top.
6. Layer with half of the soup mixture and half of the cheese.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Bake at 325°F for 20-30 minutes.
